stemHtml:
Due to significant weather conditions in the vicinity of the destination aerodrome, the pilot of a Commercial Air Transport flight has to plan for two destination alternate aerodromes. Given the following information, what is the Alternate Fuel required?

Average cruise fuel flow: 46 kg/min 
Fuel for missed approach: 400 kg 
Flight time from missed approach altitude to destination first alternate: 54 min
Flight time from missed approach altitude to destination second alternate: 44 min
